summary: Complete testing of Golf Trip Planner feature. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All Trip Planner flows working correctly (3-step wizard, service selection, date/time picker, form submission). Footer X icon present and links to correct URL. Scroll dots navigation functional with all 9 sections navigable.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/trip-planner: PASS - Creates trip request successfully, returns id/status/message
backend_api_tests.GET /api/trip-planner: PASS - Returns list of trip requests with all required fields
backend_api_tests.trip_planner_validation: PASS - Rejects invalid email (422), missing required fields (422)
backend_api_tests.trip_planner_persistence: PASS - Created requests are retrievable via GET
backend_api_tests.all_partners_for_dropdowns: PASS - Returns hotels, restaurants, beach_clubs for venue selection
backend_api_tests.michelin_restaurants: PASS - Michelin restaurants available for Trip Planner

frontend_trip_planner_tests.plan_your_trip_button: PASS - Button visible in hero section with data-testid='hero-plan-trip'
frontend_trip_planner_tests.modal_opens: PASS - Trip Planner modal opens on button click
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_1_services: PASS - All 3 services selectable (Hotel Stay, Michelin Dining, Beach Club)
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_1_venue_dropdowns: PASS - Venue dropdowns appear when services selected
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_1_next_disabled: PASS - Next button disabled until service selected
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_2_calendar: PASS - Calendar shows current month with selectable future dates
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_2_time_slots: PASS - Time slot grid (09:00-21:00) allows selection
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_2_group_size: PASS - +/- buttons work, displays group size correctly
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_2_next_disabled: PASS - Next button disabled until date selected
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_3_form_fields: PASS - Name, email (required), phone, special requests (optional) present
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_3_summary: PASS - Summary section shows selected services, date, time, group size
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_3_submit_disabled: PASS - Submit button disabled without required fields
frontend_trip_planner_tests.step_3_submit_success: PASS - Form submits successfully, shows success view

frontend_footer_tests.x_twitter_icon: PASS - X icon present with data-testid='footer-x-link', href='https://x.com/Golfinmallorca'
frontend_footer_tests.instagram_icon: PASS - Instagram icon present with data-testid='footer-instagram-link'
frontend_footer_tests.facebook_icon: PASS - Facebook icon present and links correctly

frontend_scroll_dots_tests.dots_present: PASS - 9 navigation dots found for all sections
frontend_scroll_dots_tests.courses_navigation: PASS - Clicking courses dot scrolls to courses section
frontend_scroll_dots_tests.contact_navigation: PASS - Clicking contact dot scrolls to contact section
frontend_scroll_dots_tests.hover_effect: PASS - Dots appear on hover (desktop ghost effect), label shows on hover

GET /api/trip-planner - Contains required fields (id, name, email, services, date, group_size, created_at)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Trip Planner, Footer, and Scroll Dots tests passed

seed_data_creation: Created test trip requests via API and Playwright with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trip Planner feature fully tested and working. 3-step wizard modal with service selection (Hotel Stay, Michelin Dining, Beach Club), date/time picker with shadcn calendar, group size controls (1-20), contact form, and summary display. Backend stores requests in MongoDB trip_planner_requests collection. Footer has X/Twitter icon linking to https://x.com/Golfinmallorca. Scroll dots appear on hover on right side of screen with 9 sections navigable. All data-testids documented in TripPlanner.jsx component.
